summary: Introducing AI tools, new admin experience & design controls Discussion | Link
content: WordPress 7.0 marks the start of a new era, laying the foundation for AI across the WordPress experience. Greeting you with a modern, more intuitive dashboard, 7.0 introduces enhanced customization and development tools that inspire creativity and tap into endless potential. Whether you’re a creator, business owner or developer – WordPress 7.0 let’s you create in a way that is uniquely your own.
chineseSummary: 引入人工智能工具、新的管理体验和设计控制关联
chineseContent: WordPress 7.0 标志着新时代的开始，为整个 WordPress 体验中的人工智能奠定了基础。 7.0 为您带来了现代化、更直观的仪表板，引入了增强的定制和开发工具，可激发创造力并挖掘无限潜力。无论您是创作者、企业主还是开发人员，WordPress 7.0 都可以让您以独特的方式进行创作。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
